description: You are a Financial Intelligence Analyst at a bank's AML Compliance unit. Regulators have flagged the bank for inadequate transaction monitoring, and you must implement advanced pattern-based detection covering structuring, layering, and risk scoring using the AML_INVESTIGATOR schema (aml_investigator/AML2024Secure on XEPDB1). Following the requirements in /home/ga/Desktop/aml_detection_rules.txt, identify structuring patterns and record them in a STRUCTURING_ALERTS table. Trace fund flow chains through intermediary accounts up to 6 levels deep in a FUND_FLOW_VW view. Identify layering activity and populate a LAYERING_ALERTS table. Develop a CUSTOMER_RISK_SCORE_VW view calculating composite scores based on the factors in the specification. Create a procedure named PROC_GENERATE_SAR_RECOMMENDATIONS to populate a SAR_RECOMMENDATIONS table for customers with a risk score of 60 or higher, including a narrative summary of suspicious indicators. Export the final SAR recommendations to /home/ga/aml_investigation_report.csv.
